edit.description: Configure the settings for this node in your workflow.
edit.discardDescription: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

nodes.webhookUrlsDescription: Test mode runs the latest draft so you can verify changes before publishing. Production runs the published agent. Both require an API key in the X-API-Key header.
nodes.testUrlHelper: Runs the latest draft, falling back to the published agent when no draft exists.

mention.noRecordings: No recordings found. Upload recordings via the Recordings panel.

tools.label: Tools
tools.description: Select tools that the agent can use during the conversation.
tools.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# tool selected} other {# tools selected}}

documents.label: Knowledge Base Documents
documents.description: Select documents that the agent can reference during conversations.
documents.noDocumentsAvailable: No documents available. Upload documents to the knowledge base first.
documents.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# document selected} other {# documents selected}}

agentNode.name: Agent Node
agentNode.description: Conversational step — the LLM runs one focused exchange.

endCall.name: End Call
endCall.description: Closes the conversation and hangs up.

globalNode.name: Global Node
globalNode.description: Persona/tone appended to every agent node's prompt.

qa.name: QA Analysis
qa.description: Run LLM quality analysis on the call transcript.

startCall.name: Start Call
startCall.description: Entry point of the workflow — plays a greeting and opens the conversation.

trigger.name: API Trigger
trigger.description: Public HTTP endpoints that launch the workflow.

tuner.name: Tuner
tuner.description: Export the completed call to Tuner for Agent Observability.

webhook.name: Webhook
webhook.description: Send HTTP request after the workflow completes.

dialog.title: Edit Condition
dialog.conditionLabelHelper: Enter a short label which helps identify this pathway in logs
dialog.conditionHelper: Describe a condition that will be evaluated to determine if this pathway should be taken
dialog.transitionSpeechHelper: Optional text or audio the assistant will play right before transitioning to the node. This will not be attached in Conversation Context. Use this as simple filler to reduce latency.
dialog.transitionSpeechPlaceholder: e.g. Let me transfer you to our billing department...

audio.staticTextWarning: This text is spoken as-is. For multilingual workflows, choose your phrasing carefully. Realtime (speech-to-speech) models can't play static text.
audio.selectHelper: Select a pre-recorded audio file to play.
audio.searchPlaceholder: Search by ID, transcript, or filename...
